last_result: Cycle 78 complete. RCBC DC#3 confirmed — healthcare quality scorecard gaming (regulated institutional domain). Three ontological types now confirmed: designed empirical (DC#1 AI benchmarks), emergent social (DC#2 NCLB education), regulated institutional (DC#3 CMS healthcare). ZR Cycle 2 PASSED — no retractions across all RCBC components. Confidence 0.79 → 0.81 (precise: 0.815). Key insight: DC#3 is strongest individual confirmation because explicit federal penalties and monitoring should suppress gaming, yet mechanism operates anyway. D4 gap: 0.005. One ZR cycle (C79) from D4 eligibility.
